news.title: What does it mean to make art with code? — the generative artist behind Fidenza, QQL, Incomplete Control, Day Gardens, and more — answers in our new documentary  Plus: the curation of OpenSea's QQL, by Tyler himself. Chapters: [0:00](https://x.com/opensea/status/2057506958912188642?t=0) Art Meets Community [0:37](https://x.com/opensea/status/2057506958912188642?t=37)

OpenSea Your portfolio shouldn't live in five tabs. All your wallets. All your assets. One feed. NFTs and tokens, now together in one place 5 years ago, I released my first collection on . That drop opened my mind to an onchain art movement that was just beginning. On June 3, I return with [GLiFS.art](https://t.co/Yy7ShJrymq) This time, the collection won’t be complete without your participation.

OpenSea GLiFS by @Efdotstudio 300 symbols 3,000 collector-made compositions. One shared visual language. Drops June 3 opensea.io/collection/gli buying an onchain agent with Face ID hits different… mobile meets Today, I want to share that I’ve been a mobile tester for OpenSea for over a month now. The whole team has been working hard — fixing the bugs we report, adding the features we suggest, and ...

6529 ~1 month old  Some of you know me from somewhere else  My views on NFTs in the thread below 1/ On How Short Life Is A few years ago, I was walking around in a blizzard in SoHo (New York). It was late, midnight, and it was beautiful. Some friends, about 15 blocks away, called: "come over?" It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...

! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Two 20 year old NFT rugpullers getting charged with wire fraud and money laundering, which both carry a maximum sentence of 20 years in prison So reporting to CI actually does work. Maybe we should send some more names their way. WAGMI Ledger co-founder and former CEO admits that governments can subpoena access to your funds...

Okay I’m not doing this obnoxious shit. I’ll just say it. This is embarrassing for the United States n making me regret my vote. MELANIA TRUMP The Official Melania Meme is live! You can buy $MELANIA now.melaniameme.com FUAfBo2jgks6gB4Z4LfZkqSZgzNucisEHqnNebaRxM1P So I’ve been working with my likely meme coin drop team. We’ve come up with a way to do the drop so the coins is spread EQUALLY across 1...

Here is my full interview with from Monday, September 16th at Mar-a-Lago. It was incredible to be able to speak about our industry and how Donald Trump plans on making America the "Crypto Capital of the world”. Look mom, I just interviewed ! What an honour. Thank you Mr. President, and thank you to everyone who helped make this happen. This experience has been life changing, and I am looking forwa...
